data.title: Port Fractal Tech Hub content to Campus page, rename to Fractal Campus

data.body: BLOCKED on user: Julianna to provide Fractal Tech Hub content. Port with same formatting/style as rest of site. Global rename: every 'Fractal Tech Hub' -> 'Fractal Campus'. Julianna will edit in-place after initial paste.

Julianna delivered full Fractal Tech Hub source copy + edit rules (2026-04-14). Processed final copy saved to .lattice/notes/FRAC-168.md with all transforms applied: emojis removed, Tech Hub -> Campus, Bootcamp -> Fractal AI Accelerator, email removed (replaced with Luma link CTA), 'Just passing through?' -> 'Or', first-sentence edits, 3 audiences -> 4 (added Fractal U), Renaissance sentence shortened per verbatim instruction. Open items: Luma URL (depends on FRAC-166), Fractal U link target.

URLs confirmed (2026-04-14): Luma = https://luma.com/nyc-tech; Fractal U = https://fractaluniversity.substack.com/ (existing sitewide button, src/components/sections/LiberalArts.tsx:38 — reuse that Button). Renaissance sentence clarification: it is an EDIT to the existing sentence, not truncated — Julianna's wording is the final version. Notes updated.
